summary: Comprehensive testing of three P0 features: CRM Quote Builder Drawer, Dashboard Empty States, and Document Tables Standardization. All features are working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 features verified working: 1) CRM Quote Builder - opens from lead detail, product search works (3 results for 'cotton'), 30% margin auto-calculation, negotiated toggle recalculates price, item type lock-in (Service disabled after adding Product and vice versa). 2) Document Tables - Quotes, Purchase Orders, Delivery Notes all have standardized columns (Document #, Client/Vendor, Date, Amount, Status, Actions). 3) Empty States - code verified in StaffPerformancePage, SalesPerformancePage, AdminSalesRatingsPage with Users/TrendingUp icons and 'No data available yet' message.
verified_working: CRM Quote Builder opens from lead detail via 'Create Quote' button (data-testid='crm-create-quote-btn')
Quote Builder Product flow: search returns 3 products for 'cotton', shows base price and selling price with 30% margin
Quote Builder: Negotiated toggle works - entering negotiated cost (5000) recalculates selling price (6500 = 5000 * 1.30)
Quote Builder: After adding product, Service button is disabled (item type lock-in with cursor-not-allowed class)
Quote Builder Service flow: 21 service types available, vendor base price input, auto-calculated selling price with 30% margin
Quote Builder: After adding service, Product button is disabled (item type lock-in)
QuotesRequestsPage (/admin/quotes): standardized columns - Document #, Client, Date, Amount, Status, Actions
PurchaseOrdersPage (/admin/procurement/purchase-orders): standardized columns - Document #, Vendor, Date, Amount, Status, Actions
DeliveryNotesPage (/admin/delivery-notes): standardized columns - Document #, Client, Date, Amount, Status, Actions
StaffPerformancePage: empty state code verified (lines 100-104) with Users icon and 'No data available yet'
SalesPerformancePage: empty state code verified (lines 85-89) with Users icon and 'No data available yet'
AdminSalesRatingsPage: empty states for reps table (lines 180-184) and trend (lines 222-226) with icons and 'No data available yet'
api_tests_passed: GET /api/products?search=cotton&limit=10 - returns 3 products with id, name, base_price, category
GET /api/admin/procurement/purchase-orders - returns PO list with standardized fields
